raw_input:
[4.0/5] It Works for What We Wanted It For Husband grew a beard the moment he was put on blood thinners, and he has it trimmed once a month, but sometimes that's not enough. When it gets too long he tends to look like Grizzly Adams. I would keep it tamed with scissor trims, but this works much better; he can do the trim himself, and also trim his cheeks and mustache. We haven't tried it on trimming the hair at the back of his neck.

He does not like that it is only USB and you have to buy a wall plug adapter to charge it. I guess they figure most people have them now, but it should come with one. That's just being cheap. [5.0/5] New Maybuy Beard Trimmer Takes On Viking Beard -- And Wins! The gene pool I come from has Viking, German, and Irish heritage -- resulting in a stiff wiry beard that defeats most cordless beard trimmers. To give this trimmer a good chance I followed the directions and charged it for the two hours as recommended in the instructions. My only gripe about this process is that you're supposed to keep an eye on it so that when charging is finished you can disconnect it immediately to avoid potential damage. Since the unit has no automatic shut-off when charging is completed, you have to keep an eye on it to avoid a problem. That is my only gripe about this unit. Not too many people have the time flexibility to watch it for the two hours (or less) it needs to charge.

While it only comes with 3 attachments that is all you really need. The shaver itself is large enough to give you a firm grip and the weight implies quality. The initial effort at trimming my beard was highly successful. I grew it for two weeks to make it a challenge and then shaved it without using any attachments. Normally (with other units) I would have expected difficulty in shaving it flush with my skin. Typically this type of trimmer is not powerful enough to plow through my beard, pulls some hair out instead of cutting it, and sometimes nicks my skin. None of that happened here. Evidently the battery and the motor are up to the task.

This is by far the best cordless trimmer I have ever owned and used. Highly recommended! [4.0/5] Nice smooth glide and large head makes for easy work The Maybuy Professional Hair Clippers/Beard Trimmers comes with 3 attachments, 1/2 inch, 1 inch and 1.5 inches. These attachments simply clip onto the head of the trimmer. You also get a small brush for cleaning the trimmer and a charging cable which strangely is a USB to Mini-USB even though at the bottom of the trimmer is your standard two prong charging connector.

Being able to charge this via USB however is great for when you need to go on holiday/vacation as you always have some kind of USB charging device with yourself (usually for your phone). On a full charge the clippers will roughly 2 hours and are small enough to just throw in your toiletry bag.

The trimmer itself has a nice shape to it and is comfortable to hold in your hand. It also has a fairly nice heft to it, not too light but not heavy. It feels like you are really holding on to something though.

The head is fairly wide which can be a plus in that it doesn't take long at all to trim an area but can also be a bit of a minus depending on the shape of your face if you are trimming your beard. The action is smooth and has a nice gliding feel to it, even if you don't use any attachments and just use the trimmer head itself.

It would have been nice if the Maybuy came with some sort of carrying case to put it, the attachments and the charging cord in but it doesn't unfortunately. The attachments do come in a small Ziploc bag.

Overall a nice trimmer, nice action and makes quick work whether trimming your beard or hard to reach places like around your ears. [4.0/5] Basic, Good Quality, Affordable So I got this out and started using it on my husband immediately. It is perfect for cleaning up the hairline. My husband can't stand hair on his neck so it cleans it up very well. If you plan to use this to give yourself a haircut, your hair will be very short when done. It has clips but they aren't for longer hair. My best friend cuts his own hair but his is longer and he uses a kit that has more clip sizes with it. If you are concerned you might not know how to use this well, get online and watch videos. There are so many that will tell you exactly how to do it and how to use clippers. If you keep your hair very short, this is good to use so you don't have to go back to the barber too quickly and can keep a big haircut at bay. Look at the width of the head and make sure that suits you. That was something I hadn't considered until I started using this. I think it would be easier to maneuver for the beard if it were just a little narrower. However, with the size it is you can cover more area much more quickly, with fewer passes. It removes the hair very well with just one pass. It doesn't come with oil but it is recommended you oil this as needed. It comes with a cable for charging. Because it is cordless, I can use it anywhere and that is very convenient. The clips go one easy and can be a little harder to get off. The more I'm using them though, the more accustomed to it I am becoming. [4.0/5] Small is useful Surprisingly, this small set, probably the smallest I've seen so far, comes with everything you will need for beard-mustache trimming and it could be used for hair styling for as long as your hair is not too long.
I would recommend it as a travel option because of its small and efficient size but it could also be used as the default beard or generally facial hair tool if your needs aren't anything special. [4.0/5] Keeping me well trimmed I have been making the wife happy and staying trimmed... I never use a clean shave razor, but have been keeping a close shave with this trimmer. Working great, light and maneuvers with easy [5.0/5] Great for home or the salon There is plenty to like about this kit.

First, I like that it's USB powered. That is a major convenience, especially if using in a professional setting. Secondly, it's got good balance and is ergonomically pleasing. A great feature when you're using is regularly.

My sister, who has been a professional for 20 years, said it was among the sharpest (in a good way!) she's ever used. Obviously this is huge when working on customers and you don't want to pulling hair out when you're trying to cut it.

With the myriad attachments, there's really very little you can't do with it. And best of all, the price is great for what you get. I would recommend this for both home and professional settings.

The battery length isn't great, but it also charges really quickly, so it's simply a matter of being mindful of it. [5.0/5] Great quality This is an excellent budget brand for a nice quality set of clippers. They work very well on toddler hair, which is mostly what I've used them for so far. It charges super quickly and lasts for quite a while. I also really love that it's cordless, which makes it very maneuverable. I've found that it also works reasonably well for face shaving. Great set--highly recommended! [5.0/5] Perfect Ergonomic Design I always wondered how you can see some guys always sporting a three-day beard. It seems with my beard it is either too short or way too long. This product provides an excellent choice of three beard trimming guides (guides reflect the following numbers on the guides -- 1/2 and a 1 and a 1-1/2). You may want to consider starting with the highest number and working your way to the smallest to make sure you don't do what I did and make your beard immediately shorter than you anticipated. However, with that said, I found the perfect combination for me is using the 1/2 which is the equivalent of a three-day beard.

When receiving the product it shipped with a travel guard for safety. With no guard, you could easily shave your head. The quality of the product is superb with excellent weight and is easy to use. On/off switch is an easy up for on and down for off. A green light comes on to let you know that you are in business. It is a quieter device than most. I charged the battery when it first arrived using the provided USB cord and it is still going strong. NOTE. You must have an AC adapter that you can plug into the wall. This device does not come with it. However, you can charge on your computer or other charging device.

I love it! You will not be disappointed. [5.0/5] Great Scissors. I bought these for my daughter and she LOVES them. [4.0/5] Does a good job with the guards on but is not good for shaving beard off This product is easy to charge and easy to use. It does a nice job of trimming my beard with one of the guards on. However, there are limits to the length you can trim since it only has four small guards. So if you want your beard a little longer, this is not the product for you. Also, if you are looking for a product that can be used to take off your beard completely when you are preparing for a clean shave, this is not the product for you. It is best used for trimming with a guard attached, which it does nice and evenly. [5.0/5] Scissors that really work!! These scissors worked exactly how I expected a top of the line professional scissors to work. It is fabulous. Sharp and felt good in my hands. And they are beautiful. Thank you. [4.0/5] Four Stars Great for the price! [5.0/5] Great little clippers with good performance This is a great little clipper and it performs exactly as expected. My favorite feature is that it is rechargeable so it is used without a cord attached. I've had one with a cord for years so I really appreciate the difference. [4.0/5] Small and portable for trimming I always cut my husband's and sons' hair, so having a wireless option sounded great. It works well as a trimmer, and charged up easily via the USB cable. It's handy for a quick beard or mustache trim as well. It comes with some guards, but not the ones for cutting hair that go up to an inch. This is for trimming, not for buzz cuts unless you're skilled with using the comb as a guard.

It's fairly quiet, but not whisper silent or anything. It doesn't come with oil, but needs to be oiled.

I found it interesting that on the bottom where you charge it, there is a slot for a traditional cord and it says "two-way" but this only includes USB. I think this is the budget version of the clipper. It's odd that it doesn't include a cord if it has the ability to be charged two ways. I have a zillion USB cords laying around the would work with this, but no standard cords. Those are specific to the wattage of a device.

This is a handy extra tool to have along with my regular clippers. And it's portable if someone needs to trim facial hair and travels. [5.0/5] Really nice! Fine product, fine customer service. These feel great in the hand and are very easy to control. I have used more expensive products that were not as nice. [5.0/5] Five Stars These shears are awsome

response:
Trimmer work good. Husband on blood thinners, beard grow fast, need tame monthly. Scissor trim work better for cheeks and mustache. USB charge only, no wall plug included, need adapter.

Viking beard man say trimmer best cordless ever owned. Stiff wiry beard no problem. Must charge two hours first. No auto shutoff when done charging, must watch. Three attachments included. Trim flush to skin, no pulling, no nicks. Highly recommend.

Head wide, smooth glide, comfortable hold. USB Mini USB charge good for travel. No carrying case, just small bag for attachments. Good for hard reach spots near ears.

Good for cleaning hairline and neck hair. Cordless convenient. Head wide, cover area fast, fewer passes needed. Oil recommended but not included. Videos online help learn use.

Small trimmer, good for travel. Best for beard and mustache. Not ideal for long hair styling.

Wife happy husband stay trimmed. Light, easy maneuver.

USB power convenient. Good balance, ergonomic. Professional stylist sister approve. Many attachments. Good price. Battery last, charge fast.

Good budget clippers. Work on toddler hair. Charge fast, last long. Cordless make maneuverable. Work for face shaving too.

Three beard guides included: half inch, one inch, one and half inch. Start high, work down. Half inch give three day beard look. No AC adapter, need USB source. Quality good, quiet, easy use.

Daughter love scissors.

Easy charge, easy use. Guards limit length to four short options. Best for trimming or prep for clean shave.

Scissors sharp, professional quality, feel good in hand.

Great price.

Rechargeable favorite feature. No cord needed. Big difference from old corded clippers.

Wireless good for cutting husband and sons hair. Quiet but not silent. Needs oiling. Two way charge port, USB or traditional cord. Good travel tool for facial hair.

Feel great in hand, easy control. Compare well to expensive products.

Shears awesome.
